item.title: Cancer in Canada: Progress Made, but Challenges Remain
item.description: The latest data point to improvements for many cancer types and a continued decline in overall cancer mortality. Medscape News Canada

item.title: Prescribing Isotretinoin: FDA Approves iPLEDGE Modifications
item.description: Modifications to the iPLEDGE Risk Evaluation and Mitigation Strategy aim to reduce challenges for patients, prescribers and pharmacies. Medscape Medic...

item.title: 4 Questions Rival Lipid Panel for Assessing Men’s Heart Risk
item.description: Men in their thirties and forties often overlook key clues that could help them slow the progression of cardiovascular disease. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Comparing Paracetamol and Ibuprofen Safety in Infant Care
item.description: Paracetamol and ibuprofen show no significant difference in the risk for eczema or bronchiolitis during the first year of life in infants, and may be ...

item.title: Metabolic Syndrome Tied to Glaucoma Risk
item.description: Metabolic syndrome, rather than BMI or waist circumference, is linked to an increased likelihood of glaucoma and may better identify adults who could ...
